channel.title: Scripting on Ricardo Ribeiro
channel.description: Recent content in Scripting on Ricardo Ribeiro

item.title: Meme Forum — Port Knocking & Password Cracking
item.description: A challenge combining hidden endpoint discovery, port knocking brute force, FTP access, and RAR password cracking with John the Ripper.

item.title: Nicolay Magic Numbers — Network Knocker & Brute Force
item.description: A multi-stage challenge involving port knocking with a Fibonacci sequence, WAF bypass via rate limiting, and a nested zip bomb requiring scripted extraction.

item.title: Otillianni Math — Prime Number Indexing
item.description: A data obfuscation challenge where a flag is hidden inside 10,000 random characters by placing each flag character at prime number indices.

item.title: Roda do Hamster — Layered Encoding Decoder
item.description: A challenge solved by scripting a recursive decoder that automatically strips multiple layers of Base16/32/64/85 and Ascii85 encoding until plain text is revealed.
